label: Boulevard
rule_summary: Urban Toughness >= 4 and sun exposure includes sun.
caveat: Candidate filter based on display fields with P7 evidence gaps preserved.

label: Rain Garden
rule_summary: Soil moisture includes moist, wet, winter wet, or vernal wetness.
caveat: Candidate filter based on display fields with P7 evidence gaps preserved.

label: Dry Sun
rule_summary: Sun exposure includes sun and soil moisture includes dry.
caveat: Candidate filter based on display fields with P7 evidence gaps preserved.

label: Shade
caveat: Candidate filter based on display fields with P7 evidence gaps preserved.

label: Pollinator Review
rule_summary: 20 native PoC species queued for pollinator evidence review.
caveat: Not a PSI score and not a reviewed pollinator-support ranking.

label: Low Growing
rule_summary: No height or spread field exists in the current PoC artifact.
caveat: Do not infer low-growing suitability until stature data is reviewed.
